title: Cousinia alpicola
taxonomy: Cousinia alpicola belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is classified as a genus within the tribe Cardueae. Cousinia alpicola is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, specifically in Tajikistan. The classification of Cousinia alpicola is further detailed under the subfamily Carduoideae. This classification provides a comprehensive understanding of the plant's evolutionary history and relationships within its family.
